name: AI Water Purification
desc: Project Lead for an AI-powered, low-cost filtration system. Uses an ESP32-WROOM-32 microcontroller with pH, TDS, and turbidity sensors and an embedded ML model.

name: ISRO-Themed Project
desc: Chain-of-thought based LLM system for complex spatial tasks. Developed using Google Gemini, LangGraph, GeoPandas, and Folium for automated geoprocessing.

name: Kitchen Gas Alert
desc: Automated gas protection system using MQ-2 and MQ-7 sensors to detect LPG and CO leaks. Controlled by an ESP32 for real-time alerts and shut-offs.

name: Waste-to-Compost
desc: Automated apartment composting solution using ESP32, pH sensors, and load cells to optimize microbial decomposition of kitchen waste.
